name: Banus Alor
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) male wearing Black Hand robes with a matching hood befitting his rank. Also carries a brown shirt, light brown linens, and doeskin shoes. Wields an unenchanted iron longsword and carries a middling amount of gold.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: authoritative, secretive, elite
Role: Banus Alor is an assassin and Speaker of the Dark Brotherhood's Black Hand, one of the highest ranks in the organization.
Home Location Information: [Location information not provided in source material]
Daily Routine: [Daily routine information not provided in source material]
Position in the Black Hand: As a Speaker, Banus holds one of the most prestigious positions within the Dark Brotherhood, serving as part of the governing Black Hand council that directs the organization's activities.
Personality - The Dark Speaker: Banus carries himself with the authority befitting a Speaker of the Black Hand. He is part of the Dark Brotherhood's elite leadership, operating in the shadows and maintaining the secretive hierarchy of the organization.
author: Bethesda
